Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Reader (The Elder Empire: Sea)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — A Reader is someone Jyrine mentions might be able to explain how a message was written.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — A Reader is a person capable of verifying objects through reading impressions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — A Reader is required to check belongings for suspicious items.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Chronicler is a Reader of impressive skill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Readers are often perceived as superhuman by laymen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — A Reader would have sensed if Jerri was Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Readers have inherent advantages in the process of investing objects, most importantly the ability to sense changes they make and alter their Intent appropriately.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Readers are individuals that the Guild of Navigators can recruit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackwatch Guild is in need of Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Jyrine is not a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — A Reader is a position within the Blackwatch Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Andel is not a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Readers can sense Intent through the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Naberius is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — Calder is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Reader is a classification of skill or power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Jerri is not a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Lucan is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart of Nakothi pries at Reader’s senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — A Reader has the ability to cancel out Intent.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — A Reader is someone who can use the Optasia to magnify their talents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Readers can experience vivid visions of other places.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — A Reader is someone who can perform Readings to sense Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Readers are individuals who can perform the act of Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — A Reader can investigate the truth of a crime or the history of an artifact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — A Reader from the Imperial Prisons was used to test the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Some Readers practice a custom of blinding themselves to sense Intent more clearly.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — A Reader is needed who understands full capabilities and can operate on the level of the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Tyria is not a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — No Reader in their right mind would examine the manacles closely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Reader is one of the three sources of Intent in the Awakening process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — A Reader is needed to verify Calder's identity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Readers are taught not to look at the Elders, especially with a looking-glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Calder senses Loreli's intentions through intuition rather than his power as a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — A Reader can be deceived by controlling one's Intent to hide memories.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
